title: Integrating bioinformatics approaches for a comprehensive interpretation of metabolomics datasets.
author: Barupal DK Fan S Fiehn O
content: S-EPMC6358024 PMC6358024 Integrating bioinformatics approaches for a comprehensive interpretation of metabolomics datasets. Access to high quality metabolomics data has become a routine component for biological studies. However, interpreting those datasets in biological contexts remains a challenge
